title: Option to have Subcategories have the same Column and Status Settings
excerpt: We typically have the same columns and Status settings for our main columns and our subcategories.  Right now if you update a main column or status settings, it does not affect the subcategories.  We would love to see an…

posts.author: emetcalfe.Parishsoft (Eva Metcalfe)
posts.cookedHtml: We typically have the same columns and Status settings for our main columns and our subcategories. Right now if you update a main column or status settings, it does not affect the subcategories. We would love to see an option where we can mark the board to have any changes to the main columns or status settings automatically affect the subcategories as well.
